name: Update tasks table schema
description: Add story_point (integer), completed_at (datetime), and due_date (datetime) columns to the tasks table to support tracking and burndown analysis.

name: Implement POST /groups/generate-presigned-urls
description: Develop API to generate presigned URLs for secure document upload (DOCX, Excel) to cloud storage.

name: Implement POST /groups/{group_id}/sprints/generation
description: Develop core AI logic to parse uploaded documents and generate a sprint plan based on provided additional context.

name: Implement AI feature access control
description: Restrict AI sprint generation and planning features to users with Owner or Manager roles.

name: Build document upload and context UI
description: Create frontend interface for file selection and a text area for users to provide additional AI instructions/context.

name: Build Sprint Preview and Edit interface
description: Develop a UI to display AI-generated tasks in a preview list allowing users to modify details before final submission.

name: Develop Task Status Classification logic
description: Implement backend logic to categorize tasks as Early, On Time, Late, or Spillover based on completion and due dates.

name: Implement Burndown Data calculation
description: Create service to calculate daily expected vs. actual remaining story points for the sprint duration.

name: Implement GET /groups/{group_id}/sprints/{sprint_id}/export
description: Develop API to generate and download an Excel file containing the sprint work list and burndown metrics.

name: Implement Excel daily cell and formatting logic
description: Apply conditional formatting and logic to fill story points in the daily columns of the exported Excel report.
